expertise.title: Full-Stack Web Development
expertise.description: Developing end-to-end applications with a focus on MVC patterns and RESTful APIs. Creating responsive, mobile-first interfaces using modern CSS frameworks like Tailwind and efficient server-side rendering.

expertise.title: Database Infrastructure
expertise.description: Managing relational and NoSQL data structures across SQL Server, MySQL, and MongoDB. Utilizing ORM/ODM tools like JPA and Mongoose for efficient data persistence and schema management.

expertise.title: DevOps & Tooling
expertise.description: Streamlining development with Git/GitHub through structured branching strategies. Managing project lifecycles via Jira and automating routine tasks with Bash scripting for smoother workflows.

expertise.title: Mobile Development
expertise.description: Building native applications for iOS (Swift) and Android (Kotlin). Focused on applying responsive design principles and consistent UI patterns to create seamless mobile experiences.

expertise.title: Architecture & Patterns
expertise.description: Applying Clean Architecture principles and strict layer separation to ensure code maintainability. Utilizing Repository, DTO, and Service patterns to build testable and scalable software.

expertise.title: Microsoft / .NET
expertise.description: Constructing web applications using ASP.NET Core MVC, Entity Framework, and Razor Pages. Implementing secure authentication via Identity and managing data persistence through SQL Server.

expertise.title: Java Ecosystem
expertise.description: Developing applications with Spring Boot, Thymeleaf, and Spring Data JPA. Experienced in multi-module project structures and utilizing Hibernate ORM for robust relational data management.
